name: marmoui-plugins
description: Claude Code plugins for Marmo UI — the AI agentic designer. Install marmo-ui to give Claude a real design system: live component APIs, patterns, and validated generation.

plugins.name: marmo-ui
plugins.description: Build production UI with @marmoui/ui. Bundles the marmo-ui skill, /marmo-ui:* commands (init, design-md, build), and the Marmo MCP server so Claude reads real component props instead of guessing. Free tier needs no token.
